style.overall_style: Dark, moody food photography with bold promotional overlay

design_language.visual_hierarchy: Discount text dominates upper half, food product dominates center-lower
design_language.composition: Layered — background bokeh, foreground hand-held food, text floating above
design_language.border_element: White rectangular border/frame around discount text to create emphasis box

accent_colors: Warm pink/magenta bokeh lights in background
color_logic.color_emotion: Warm, appetizing, energetic — dark background makes food colors pop vividly

typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Percentage number largest → supporting offer text medium → brand name smallest

text_placement.discount_callout: Center-upper inside a white bordered box

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center to lower-center of frame, held by human hand (partial hand visible)
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Blurred dark bokeh background with warm light spots
graphics_and_image_placement.human_element: Partial hand holding food — creates intimacy and appetite appeal

message_delivery.strategy: Appetite-first — visually stunning food image grabs attention, discount text converts
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — brand logo at bottom acts as CTA anchor

style.overall_style: Premium lifestyle food photography, natural and warm aesthetic

design_language.approach: Editorial food photography with large typographic overlay
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Giant discount percentage on left, premium product on right
design_language.composition: Split visual — text occupies left column, food occupies right column
design_language.depth: Warm blurred background with wooden textures giving a cafe/kitchen feel

color_logic.primary_background: Warm dark brown (wooden table, moody cafe ambiance)

text_colors.headline: Warm cream/off-white (not pure white — feels premium and soft)

color_logic.color_emotion: Rich, premium, indulgent yet healthy — purple tones evoke freshness and luxury

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold, wide serif-influenced sans-serif, all caps
typography.headline_size: Extremely large — percentage number nearly fills left half of frame
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Percentage largest → OFF text large → supporting offer small → brand name base
typography.text_case: All caps for promotional and supporting text

text_placement.discount_callout: Left column, stacked vertically (UP TO / 60% / OFF)

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Right-center to right-lower, tall glass jar smoothie
graphics_and_image_placement.secondary_product: Wooden bowl with blueberries, lower-left foreground

message_delivery.primary_message: Maximum discount plus free delivery — new user acquisition
message_delivery.strategy: Value-stacking — two offers presented together (60% off + free delivery)
message_delivery.urgency_level: High — first order exclusive offer creates FOMO

style.overall_style: Celebrity-driven brand campaign, cinematic portrait photography

design_language.approach: Celebrity face-led, product as secondary hero
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Celebrity face dominates frame, product (sandwich) held at lower-center, text overlaid on left mid
design_language.composition: Full-bleed portrait photography — celebrity fills entire frame
design_language.depth: Flat monochrome red background — no depth, pure focus on person
design_language.border_element: Red branded pill/ribbon behind brand name text

accent_colors: Red jacket (matches background — creates seamless immersion)
Green, yellow, red food colors in sandwich (contrast anchor)
color_logic.color_emotion: Passionate, energetic, brand-consistent — red monochrome creates maximum brand recall

typography.headline_font_style: Medium weight sans-serif, mixed case, conversational
typography.headline_size: Medium — intentionally understated to let celebrity do the heavy lifting
typography.brand_name_style: Lowercase clean sans-serif inside red badge
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Headline text moderate → brand name small but badge-highlighted
typography.text_case: Mixed case (sentence case) — feels like natural speech

text_placement.brand_name: Below headline, left-center, inside a red rounded pill badge

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Lower-center, held by celebrity's both hands, positioned near chin/face
graphics_and_image_placement.celebrity_image: Full bleed, face takes up upper 60% of frame, looking directly at viewer
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Solid Zomato red — no texture or gradient
graphics_and_image_placement.human_element: Dominant — celebrity is the primary visual element

message_delivery.primary_message: Brand affinity and lifestyle association through celebrity
message_delivery.strategy: Humor + aspiration — witty copy paired with recognizable face drives shareability
message_delivery.cta_style: Brand awareness driven — no direct discount CTA
message_delivery.urgency_level: Low — awareness/engagement focused rather than conversion

style.overall_style: Bold price-point promotion with macro food photography

design_language.approach: Price hero + extreme close-up food photography
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Price dominates upper portion, food fills lower two-thirds, CTA strip at bottom
design_language.composition: Top text block → extreme food macro → bottom CTA bar — clear three-zone layout
design_language.depth: Shallow depth of field on food — subject is ultra-sharp against soft background
design_language.border_element: None — clean open layout on solid color background

color_logic.primary_background: Zomato brand red (top portion and bottom CTA zone)
color_logic.color_emotion: High energy, festive, street-food vibrancy — warm food tones against red create instant appetite appeal

typography.headline_size: Price (₹59) is the largest text element — takes up nearly 1/4 of frame height
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Price number largest → headline text medium → CTA text medium → brand name medium

text_placement.price_callout: Upper center, immediately below headline — dominant element
text_placement.brand_name: Bottom strip, inline with CTA text

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center to lower frame — extreme macro close-up of chaat/puri
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Solid Zomato red above and below food image
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Ultra close-up macro, slight upward angle, food styled to look abundant and textured

message_delivery.primary_message: Unbeatable low price point for a popular food item
message_delivery.strategy: Price shock + appetite appeal — huge price number stops the scroll, food visual converts
message_delivery.cta_style: Explicit — 'Order Now on Zomato' written directly
message_delivery.urgency_level: Very High — specific low price with asterisk creates immediate action trigger

consistent_brand_elements: Zomato red (#E23744 brand red) used across all ads
Lowercase 'zomato' logotype in clean sans-serif consistently placed at bottom
White as universal text color across all ads
High-quality food photography as primary visual anchor
Portrait/vertical format optimized for mobile and Stories placement
cross_ad_patterns.design_language_summary: Zomato ads follow a bold, food-first visual strategy. The brand alternates between two modes: (1) Dark moody premium photography for lifestyle/discount ads and (2) Bright saturated red-dominant layouts for price-point and brand ads. Typography is always large, bold, and immediate — designed for scroll-stopping impact on mobile feeds.
cross_ad_patterns.color_strategy_summary: Red is the brand anchor. When not used as a background, it appears as an accent or badge. Food photography always features warm, vibrant, appetite-stimulating tones. Text is universally white for maximum contrast.
cross_ad_patterns.typography_strategy_summary: All promotional text is oversized, bold, and condensed. The discount or price number is always the largest typographic element. Brand name is consistently understated — small but always present. Hierarchy is: Number > Supporting text > Brand.
cross_ad_patterns.image_strategy_summary: Food is always the hero — either extreme macro close-ups or held-in-hand shots. Human hands or celebrity faces are used for relatability and scale. Backgrounds are either dark bokeh (premium) or solid brand red (bold/direct).
cross_ad_patterns.message_delivery_strategy: Two clear messaging tracks: (1) Discount/value ads — appetite visual first, discount second, brand last. (2) Brand/celebrity ads — emotion/humor first, product second, brand integrated. Both tracks optimize for mobile thumb-stop behavior.
